full_text:
Shang Hong 尚弘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shang Hong (尚弘). Lowered the Emperor into a boat whilst the cavalcade fled Li Jue. Shang Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Shang Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
